PART III
FUNDAMENTAL RIGHTS

12. Definition.—In this Part, unless the context otherwise requires, “the State” includes ...

1[21A. Right to education.—The State shall provide free and compulsory education to all children.

1. Ins. by the Constitution (Eighty-sixth Amendment) Act, 2002, s. 2.
2. Subs. by the Constitution (Forty-fourth Amendment) Act, 1978, s. 2.
